mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean during rate hikes with p-value less than 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, which triggers negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 65 percent of instances when the unemployment rate crosses the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real personal spending and stable consumer prices indicates robust demand without inflationary pressure, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in greater than 55 percent of occurrences over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An expanding industrial production index reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the industrial production signal falls below 0.02 during recovery periods.

mechanism_narrative: High policy rates combined with rising unemployment indicate monetary tightening is suppressing economic activity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict negative returns with statistical significance at p greater than 0.10 in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in housing starts signals weakening residential investment and broader credit stress, which produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Housing starts declines are followed by positive equity returns in greater than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding corporate hiring and rising wage income, which supports consumer demand and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Payroll growth shows no predictive power for 5-day returns with Rank IC below 0.01 across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Strong real GDP growth paired with rising industrial production confirms synchronized economic expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The synchronized growth signal yields negative forward returns in greater than 50 percent of triggered instances.
